text: Jab main apne gunahon ko dekhta hoon aur phir Teri Rehmat ko... to meri aankhein bheeg jati hain.
Aye Ibn-e-Adam! Tu us din se dar, jab zameen tera saara hisaab ugal degi.
Qabar mein andhera hai, Namaz ki roshni saath le kar jana.
Kaash! Main mitti hota aur mera koi hisaab na hota.
Log mujhe neik samajhte hain, ye Tera parda hai Maalik. Warna mere gunah to meri tanhai janti hai.
Sajda lamba kar do, is se pehle ke tumhari Namaz-e-Janaza parhi jaye.
Maut ka farishta tumhare chehre ko din mein 70 baar dekhta hai. Kya tum tayyar ho?
Toota hua dil Allah ka pasandida ghar hai.
Jab bolne se kuch na badle, to khamosh ho kar Allah par chorr do.
Gunah karke sukoon dhoondte ho? Tum aag mein paani dhoond rahe ho.
Allah tumhare us aansoo ki qadar karta hai jo tanhai mein tumhari aankh se girta hai.
Agar tumhe pata chal jaye ke Allah tumse kitna pyar karta hai, to tum khushi se ro paro.
Aur Tera Rab bhoolne wala nahi hai.
Agar tumhare gunah aasman tak bhi pohanch jayen, phir bhi maafi maango, Wo maaf kar dega.
Sajda wo wahid jagah hai jahan tum zameen par sargoshi karte ho aur awaz Arsh par suni jati hai.
Duniya thukra de to gham na karna, Allah to har waqt tumhari pukaar sunne ke liye tayyar hai.
Ya Allah! Mere dil ko palat de us taraf, jis taraf Teri raza ho.
Tahajjud ka waqt wo hota hai jab Allah aur bande ke darmiyan koi parda nahi rehta.
Beshaq, har mushkil ke baad aasani hai.
Aur Hum insan ki shah-rag (jugular vein) se bhi zyada qareeb hain.
Duniya ki Balance Sheet tally ho na ho, Aakhirat ki Balance Sheet zaroor tally hogi.
Apna hisaab kar lo is se pehle ke tumhara hisaab kiya jaye.
Ye duniya bas 3 ghantay ka paper hai, asal result Qayamat ke din lagega.
Maut wo deadline hai jis ki extension nahi milti.
Asal imandari ye hai ke tum wahan bhi neik raho jahan koi camera ya supervisor nahi dekh raha.
Syllabus (Quran) poora parho, sawal wahin se ayenge.
Guzra hua kal kabhi wapis nahi ata, lekin aanay wala kal abhi tumhare hath mein hai.
Qabar rozana pukarti hai: 'Main akelepan ka ghar hoon, main keeron ka ghar hoon.'
Jise Allah chahiye, use sab kuch mil gaya. Jise sab kuch mila par Allah na mila, use kuch nahi mila.
Sab yahan reh jayega... Mobile, Paisa, Degree. Saath sirf Amaal jayenge.
Logon ke kandhon par jane se pehle, apne pairon par masjid chale jao.
Insan bhi ajeeb hai, mitti ka bana hai aur mitti ke neeche jane se darta hai.
Zindagi aur Maut ke darmiyan sirf saans ka fasla hai.
Ya Allah! Meri khamoshi ko meri maafi bana de.
Gunahgar ki aankh ka aansoo, Allah ko maghroor ki ibadat se zyada pasand hai.
Logon ko khush karne mein Allah ko naraz mat karna.
Jab dil ghabraye to Quran khol lena, Allah tumse baat karna chahta hai.
Kafan mein jaib nahi hoti, aur Qabar mein ATM nahi chalta.
Gunah ka maza chand seconds ka hai, lekin uska azab hamesha ka hai.
Meri Rehmat mere Ghaazab (Ghussey) par haawi (ghalib) hai.
Agar aaj maut aa gayi to kya main tayyar hoon?
Dil ka sakoon sirf Allah ke zikr mein hai.
Tumhein be-maqsad paida nahi kiya gaya.
Sabr ka ghont karwa hota hai, lekin iska phal meetha hota hai.
Allah apne piyaron ko hi azmata hai.
Sab se ba-barkat wo saans hai jo Durood-e-Pak parh kar li jaye.
Maa ki dua waqt to kya, naseeb bhi badal deti hai.
Aaj mitti ke upar ho, kal mitti ke neeche hogay. Ghuroor kis baat ka?
Jo Allah par bharosa karta hai, Allah uske liye kaafi ho jata hai.
Fajar ki namaz rizq aur chehre mein noor barhati hai.
